# pool

`github.com/lnorton89/golc/internal/pool`

Package pool models fixture pools and groups (CONTEXT POOL-01/D-10) and
their reviewable impact-plan machinery (POOL-03/D-11): a Pool is a named
logical grouping of compatible fixtures defined independently of
concrete member count, address, or deployment hardware, and a Group is
an independent cross-pool named selection -- both with durable UUIDv7
identity that is never derived from or re-minted by a display name.
BuildImpactPlan walks every dependent deployment instance and cross-pool
group for one pool add/remove request and auto-proposes a next-free
universe/address, producing a deterministic preview before anything is
committed.
